prestazioni: Engine swap to BMW B48B20C (2.0L turbo inline-4, N20/B48 family) with a custom closed-deck block reinforcement by VRSF, paired with a Garrett GTX3582R turbocharger (82mm compressor, 1.06 A/R turbine housing) and a Precision Turbo wastegate (46mm, dual-port) for 400+ WHP on E85 fuel. Upgraded fuel system includes dual Bosch 044 high-flow fuel pumps, Injector Dynamics ID1700x injectors, and a Radium Engineering dual-catch can setup with -10AN lines.

Full drivetrain reinforcement: Wavetrac limited-slip differential (front and rear) with 3.91:1 final drive ratios, upgraded CV joints by GKN Driveline with reinforced boots, and a Sachs Performance twin-disc clutch (240mm, 6-puck) mated to a Getrag GS6-53BZ 6-speed manual transmission with a short-throw shifter by UUC Motorwerks. Custom driveshafts by The Driveshaft Shop (3.5-inch aluminum, balanced to 10,000 RPM).

Suspension overhaul with Öhlins Road & Track DFV coilovers (2-way adjustable, 80mm stroke) paired with custom-valved Eibach ERS springs (8kg/mm front, 10kg/mm rear). Full poly bushings by SuperPro (part numbers SPF1044K, SPF1045K, SPF1046K) and spherical bearing subframe mounts by 034 Motorsport. Braking system upgraded to Alcon 6-piston front calipers (380mm discs) and 4-piston rear calipers (355mm discs) with Ferodo DS2500 pads and Motul RBF 660 brake fluid.
estetica: Custom Dakar-inspired widebody kit by Liberty Walk (LB-WORKS MINI Countryman Dakar Edition), featuring carbon fiber fender flares (3.5-inch wider front, 4-inch wider rear), a vented hood with heat extractors, and a rear diffuser with integrated tow hooks. Full carbon fiber front splitter by Seibon Carbon with adjustable canards (3-piece, 45-degree angle).

Off-road lighting setup: Baja Designs Squadron Pro LED pods (50W, 5000K) mounted on a custom aluminum roof rack by Prinsu Designs, paired with a Rigid Industries D-Series Pro LED light bar (50-inch, amber fog pattern) integrated into the front bumper. Rear work lights by KC HiLites (Gravity LED, 100W) with a custom wiring harness by Painless Performance (waterproof, 10-circuit).

Interior overhaul with Recaro Pole Position seats (carbon fiber backs, Alcantara inserts) mounted on custom brackets by Bride Japan, paired with a MOMO Mod.78 steering wheel (350mm, suede) and a quick-release hub by NRG Innovations. Full roll cage by Custom Cages (T45 steel, 6-point, gusseted) with harness bar and Schroth Profi II 6-point harnesses. Custom gauge cluster by AIM MXS Strada (1.3-inch OLED, CAN bus integration) with AEM X-Series wideband O2 sensor.
